basics.name: Mark Truong
basics.label: DevOps Engineer
basics.summary: Computer Science graduate from San Diego State University with production engineering experience. Hands-on with infrastructure as code (Terraform), CI/CD automation (GitHub Actions, GitLab), containerization (Docker), and serverless AWS architectures across the full deployment lifecycle. Comfortable in Agile/Scrum environments, writing technical documentation, and collaborating across teams to ship reliable, automated systems. Seeking a DevOps engineering role to build and operate scalable, reproducible infrastructure. Active DoD Secret clearance.

work.name: CineStar Cinemas
work.summary: Production-grade cinema booking platform serving real end-user traffic across multiple enterprise client sites.
highlights: Built and maintained a production-grade cinema booking platform integrating a React/Next.js frontend with a Magento 2 OOP backend, serving real end-user traffic across multiple enterprise client sites
Designed and implemented a GraphQL API layer with custom resolvers and a REST service layer, applying enterprise integration patterns compatible with both modern and legacy system architectures
Executed relational database schema changes and MySQL migrations to support new platform features, maintaining data integrity across production environments
Containerized the development environment with Docker across Linux/WSL2 and macOS, enabling reproducible builds and reducing onboarding friction for distributed teams
Authored technical documentation, architecture specs, and integration guides to support team onboarding, handoff procedures, and long-term system maintenance

work.name: San Diego State University
highlights: Tutored undergraduate students in Data Structures, Algorithms, and core CS fundamentals, reinforcing OOP principles, algorithmic thinking, and engineering best practices
Collaborated with faculty to assess student work with a focus on technical rigor, code correctness, and efficient problem-solving

projects.name: Serverless Stock Data Pipeline
projects.description: Event-driven AWS pipeline (EventBridge cron → ingestion Lambda → DynamoDB → retrieval Lambda → API Gateway → S3 static frontend) serving live stock data end to end. All infrastructure provisioned as code with Terraform; build, test, and deploy automated with GitHub Actions CI/CD.

projects.name: Cinephile
projects.description: Conversational movie recommendation engine: RAG pipeline with agentic LangGraph path, multi-turn context, and eval harness.

projects.name: AI Meme Generator
projects.description: Image captioning pipeline from AI Club at SDSU: BLIP captioning, Claude-powered meme rewriting, Pillow rendering, FastAPI + React app.

skills.name: Tools & Platforms
keywords: AWS (Lambda, DynamoDB, API Gateway, S3, EventBridge)
